name: Pasta Fontina
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Drain the pasta and transfer it to a warmed pasta bowl.
3. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Stir constantly until the butter just turns brown.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the grated Fontina cheese with the grated Asiago (or Romano/Parmesan if using).
5. Pour the melted butter into the bowl with the cheeses and stir well to combine.
6. Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss until evenly coated with the sauce.
7. Sprinkle the parsley over the top before serving.
Rich, but YUMMY!
